Table of Contents

Interface ISynchronizeParameters6

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters for synchronizing items in a mosaic dataset

[Guid("13ECAC10-4EC8-4A4D-BD67-516D3472F558")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISynchronizeParameters6 : ISynchronizeParameters5, ISynchronizeParameters4, ISynchronizeParameters3, ISynchronizeParameters2, ISynchronizeParameters
